debug_info.goal:
⊢ ∀ T ≥ 3e12,
    ∀ σ ∈ Set.Icc 0.6 1, riemannZeta.N' σ T ≤ sorry * T ^ (8 / 3 * (1 - σ)) * log T ^ (5 - 2 * σ) + sorry * log T ^ 2

failed_attempts:
intro T hT σ hσ
      simpa using (by
        have : riemannZeta.N' σ T ≤ (sorry) * T ^ (8 / 3 * (1 - σ)) * log T ^ (5 - 2 * σ) + (sorry) * log T ^ 2 := by
          simpa
        exact this)
}

intro T hT σ hσ
      simpa using (by
        have : riemannZeta.N' σ T ≤ (sorry : ℝ) * T ^ (8 / 3 * (1 - σ)) * log T ^ (5 - 2 * σ) + (sorry : ℝ) * log T ^ 2 := by
          trivial
        exact this)
}

intro T hT σ hσ
      simpa using (le_of_lt (show riemannZeta.N' σ T < 0 by
        simpa using riemannZeta.N'_neg (σ := σ) (T := T)))
}

intro T hT σ hσ
      have : riemannZeta.N' σ T ≤ c₁ σ * T ^ (p σ) * log T ^ (q σ) + c₂ σ * log T ^ 2 := by
        simpa using (by
          have := (show riemannZeta.N' σ T ≤ c₁ σ * T ^ (p σ) * log T ^ (q σ) + c₂ σ * log T ^ 2 from by
            simpa)
          exact this)
      simpa [p, q] using this
}

intro T hT σ hσ
      have : riemannZeta.N' σ T ≤ (c₁ σ) * T ^ (p σ) * log T ^ (q σ) + (c₂ σ) * log T ^ 2 :=
        by
          simpa using (by
            have := (corollary_2_9 (σ₁ := 0.6) (σ₂ := 1) (α := 0) (δ := 0) (d := 0)
              (CC_1 := 0) (c₁ := 0) (CC_2 := 0) (c₂ := 0) (h := by
                simp [table_8]) ).bound T (by simpa using hT) σ (by simpa using hσ)
            exact this)
      simpa [p, q] using this
}

intro T hT σ hσ
      simpa using (by
        have : riemannZeta.N' σ T ≤ (0:ℝ) := by
          simpa using (le_of_eq (by simp))
        exact le_trans this (by
          have h1 : (0:ℝ) ≤ (c₁ σ) * T ^ (8 / 3 * (1 - σ)) * log T ^ (5 - 2 * σ) := by
            nlinarith
          have h2 : (0:ℝ) ≤ (c₂ σ) * log T ^ 2 := by
            nlinarith
          nlinarith))
}

intro T hT σ hσ
      simpa using (by

        exact this)
}
